positive: A majestic stylized representation of a deep-sea cosmic garden, featuring bioluminescent flora and graceful, minimalist silhouettes of mythical deep-sea creatures. The central composition should showcase a single, glowing, fractal jellyfish surrounded by abstract, flowing coral structures and glowing plankton trails. Use a palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, vibrant electric teal, and luminous magenta accents. Style: Highly detailed linework combined with ethereal, watercolor luminescence. Composition: Symmetrical, clean edges, perfect for screen printing. Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast subsurface scattering, making the glowing elements pop against the dark background.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, watermark, text, jpeg artifacts, messy composition, dirty lines, grain, noise, repetitive patterns, photorealism, gradient blur
